title: Rut of Complacency
html: Stub. The recurring 2-week-motivation-then-fade pattern Yahir named in 2020 03 06 short story (Nik's wane after his grandfather's fable). Reappears as the diagnostic frame for Dad's state in 2022 10 15 things on 10 1415 2022 and as the implicit problem the 60 day activation rule is designed to solve.

related.label: Comfort over a better quality of life. Chaka did this...
So much shit to do, that we do none — title-as-aphorism
